refnamediv.refpurpose: Filter binary components by measured properties.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: out = imbwpropfilt(image, property, limits) out = imbwpropfilt(image, property, limits, connectivity)

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Keeps connected components whose area, extent, or perimeter falls within the requested limits.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.para: Source reference: OpenCV connected-components and shape-measurement documentation. The examples use known component dimensions so the accepted and rejected objects are easy to verify.
Example 1: Keep only the medium-sized component by area
Example 2: Keep a compact component and reject an L-shaped component by extent
